features: PEG BAG - With its unique design, this handy product keeps your pegs securely stored in a drawstring bag, ensuring they're always within reach when you need them.
DRAWSTRING DESIGN - The drawstring opening allows for quick and easy access. Simply pull the drawstring to open, grab what your pegs, and cinch it closed when you're done.
LARGE CAPACITY - Specifically designed to hold up to 160 pegs, its sturdy construction guarantees long-lasting durability, while its compact size makes it easy to store.
BREATHABLE MESH BASE - The breathable mesh base is designed to allow air to flow through, ensuring that your pegs dry quickly and stay in great condition for longer.
STRONG CLIP - Designed with a clever clip mechanism, this versatile accessory can be effortlessly attached to your washing line, indoor airer, or even your belt loop.
description: Product Description Minky Premium Drawstring Peg Bag - Silver Introducing our peg bag, the perfect laundry accessory for any household. Designed to provide convenience and efficiency, this ultimate laundry companion keeps your pegs organized and easily accessible. Convenient Clip Mechanism Effortlessly attach it to your washing line or even your belt loop for ultimate convenience. Drawstring Opening The drawstring opening makes it effortless to access your pegs whenever you need them. Simply pull the drawstring to open the bag wide, grab what you need, and pull it closed when you're done. Large Capacity Designed to hold up to 160 pegs, while the breathable mesh base allows for quick drying, ensuring your pegs last longer and stay in top condition.
